form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 6th of 9 at this track on April 1 over 1600m, 13 len behind Non Plus Ultra carrying 53kg at $51.70. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on February 12 2025 over 1600m, 9 len behind Sabiyano with 56kg at $14.45. Needs more time.
